Terms of Service

General conditions for the use of our platform and nautical services on the Costa del Sol.

  1. Home
  2. Terms
Last updated: February 27, 2026

RumboMed Terms of Service

Please read these terms of service carefully before using our services.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing our website and using our boat rental services and nautical experiences, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations in Spain. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing our services.

These terms apply to all users, visitors, and others who access or use our services.

2. Intellectual Property Rights

Our service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by RumboMed and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, and other intellectual property laws.

  • All content is our exclusive property.
  • You may not copy or modify the content without prior authorization.
  • Our trademarks may not be used without written permission.
  • Content is exclusively for personal, non-commercial use.

3. User Accounts and Bookings

When making a booking request or registering, you must provide us with accurate, complete, and up-to-date information. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in the immediate cancellation of your request or account.

Important Notice

You are responsible for safeguarding your data and for all activities that occur under your account or booking process.

4. Prohibited Activities

The following activities are strictly prohibited when using our services:

Systematic retrieval of data or content from the website.
Posting malicious content or computer viruses.
Unauthorized framing of or linking to our website.
Attempting unauthorized access to our systems.

5. Disclaimers

Use of our service is at your own risk. The service is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind.

We do not guarantee that:

  • The service will meet your specific requirements.
  • The service will be uninterrupted or error-free.
  • Results will be 100% accurate in real-time.

6. Governing Law

These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Malaga and Marbella.

Questions about the Terms?

Our legal team is here to help you understand our conditions.
